events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Scenario: residential concrete/masonry finishing & curing. Observed field condition: sawcut joints late (random cracking - FD). Work rough-complete. Condition category installed-defective. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Random cracking due to late sawcut joints can lead to uncontrolled cracks, aesthetic/structural/durability issues. Residential slab. Risk medium? Could be medium. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 90? Finishing/curing. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: sawcut contraction joints installed after random cracking occurred; slab exhibits random cracks due to delayed joint cutting beyond window. Actions: evaluate crack repair per ACI; install future joints timely; repair cracks by epoxy injection or routing/sealing; re-evaluate. Rationale: ACI 302 requires contraction joints be sawcut as soon as concrete can support sawing without raveling and before shrinkage stresses cause random cracking; ACI 308 curing should maintain moisture/temperature. Late sawcut caused random cracking, defective/non-compliant. References: ACI 302.1R, ACI 308.1R. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose.
